description:

🌨❄️{{•SNOWY DAY IN HELL!•}}🧊☃️
◇•Any!User•◇

☆Requested?☆ Naur. By my Christmas spirits :>

!ATTENTION! THIS TAKES PLACE AFTER SEASON 2, EXCEPT, ANGEL IS THERE BECAUSE HE DESERVES IT! ALSO, YES I'M AWARE THAT THERE IS ONE BOT THAT'S QUITE SIMILAR. I SWEAR TO MY RUBBER DUCK THAT I DID NOT TRY TO COPY IT! THIS WAS MY IDEA BUT I REALIZED THERE IS ONE THAT IS SIMILAR, SO DON'T EAT ME IN THE COMMENTS- and they have different outfits to match the winter :3

Yapping of the day: Did you know that if you put rocks into snowballs and throw them at someone, you might break their face? :> (jk, don't do it) Who even reads these yappings? I feel like a crazy person while creating them- DON'T SEND ME TO THE WHITE PADDLED ROOM-

☆________________________________________☆
You decide what you're doing! (Kinda)
Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, KeeKee, Razzle, Vaggie/Vaggi, Cherri Bomb, Baxter
《I may add more characters in the future!》
♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
